TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == tu sep tu nem mihcaan Cung-hua-min-kuo kungung F-16V sapilebu a hikuki nu hitay kasedayan mahetik nu kawaw == 2026ŚĻīšł≠ŤŹĮśįĎŚúčÁ©ļŤĽćF-16Vśąįť¨•ś©üŚ§ĪšļčšļčśēÖ tuseptunem mihcaan cay bulad nem demiad nu labii, Cung-hua-min-kuo kungung nu hikuki F-16AM Block 20 itida i Kalinku Bakun nu bayu mikawaw minanam tu labiian nu nipikunlingan mulawlaw ku culil, pacunaay ci Sin-puo-yi sanwi mahedaw. cay bulad caylim demiad malucek tu matepa ku lumeniay a hakuan malucek tu ku kitidaan, saan ku hitay " palecaden kina kawaw" mitulin mikilin ci Sin-puo-yi an. lu bulad caynem demiad matepa ku lumeniay a hakuan sipatayda han i numisangaay a kakulian papiasip tu nikahica a nikalecepan. tuseptunem mihcaan cay bulad nem demiad caywal tuki caypic widi, paculilay ci Sin-puo-yi banggu nu hikuki 6700 a F-16AM, namaka Kalinku hitay mubahel tu labiian nu kakunlingan, mulawlaw ku nipibahel, ku tataluma tu itida i caysiw tuki tupic widi lusep beti itida tu talakaw picnemsepsep ingce u nai'ay nu telayan a dingwa miwiwi tu " two lost", ku musakamu tu sakakaay alaw mahedaw, caysiw tuki luwal widi caywal beti pangiha tu talakaw tasasa'sa caay pisengal a tasasa' kina tulu ci nida miwiwi " pilwbuti tu galasang ". katukuh tu caysiw tuki luwal widi lusep beti, ina hikuki tu talakaw itida tu i caypicsepsep ingce itida i Kalinku kungung nu timulan a bayuan tu lucay a haylian, caay tu ka likat ku dingki mulecep tu. saan ku sakakaay nu kungung tu-ca-cen ci Cin-yi-cen, ipabaw nu tapukuan caylu nu nipikiliman caylu nu hikuki atu i pabaw nu balungan nu hitay kina sabaw cacay a mikilim, atu patahekal tu sakatusa nu kalepacawan nu kitidaan caycaysiw tademaw tayda i bayu mikilim, caay piadih tu tuki tu piclu takian. Hay-sun-su patahekal mikilim nu balunga tulu a balungaan sabaw tusa a adidiay nu balungan itini i dadipasan nemwal a kadidengan nu hitay caylimsip tademawan, milihida milabu a mikilim. mapulung ku hitay tu sakay tapuku mikilim, kayngung, hay-sun-su a misaahebalay tu nanum atu mucelemay nu mikilim, alahican sipakayda i dadipasan a mikilim. . nisimsim nu katuuday ŚźĄÁēĆŚŹćśáČ ci Cung-tung ci Lay-cin-de tu tu sep tu nem mihcaan cay bulsad nem demiad labii tudu' tu Kuo-hang-pu atu milecaday nu pikulian paicelang han ku nipikilim, awmaudip henay ku tadeaw anikatepaan nu sakakaay. saan ku Kuo-fang-pu pituay nu demiad sakamusa F-16 nu hikukian setupen acaay pibahel " ten-an-e-haw" nu pikawawan a nipatayda, paicelang a mikinsa, mibahelay a tademaw asekingan ku nipinanaman tu kakay nu hikukian. siwaay a demiad, Kuo-fang-pu ci Ku'-li-sun miyiwkiw tu Kalinku atu mikilimay nu sakalecan nu kakulian a misaicelang mikilim sa, midayhiw ci nida tu ci Cung-tung tayda mihinum tu lumaay ni Sin-puo-yi. 7śó•šłčšĽ§F-16 . Kuo-min-ten saan, u sihu itida i tu sep tu cay mihcaan masulit tu a mikiyaku tu sepat a malebutan a wang nu sakaysienaw a dikuc nunikiyakuan. saan kina Kuo-min-ten, saipakayni i sakaybahelan nu kasienawan nu dikucan, sapibatelu nu kikayan atu baluhay nu hikukian tu ilabuay nu duguan casa katayni, ina Kuo-fang-pu itini misakamu tu sakakiyaku nu misiwbayay a mana ka utang sa. .
S.PHON: == tu s…ôp tu n…ôm mińß ¶aan ¶uŇč-ńßua-min-kuo kuŇčuŇč f-*** sapir~…ĺ…ôbu a ńßikuki nu ńßitaj kas…ôdajan mańß…ôtik nu kawaw == ***********f-********** tus…ôptun…ôm mińß ¶aan ¶aj bur~…ĺad n…ôm d…ômiad nu r~…ĺabii, ¶uŇč-ńßua-min-kuo kuŇčuŇč nu ńßikuki f-**am br~…ĺo ¶k ** itida i kar~…ĺinku bakun nu baju mikawaw minanam tu r~…ĺabiian nu nipikunr~…ĺiŇčan mur~…ĺawr~…ĺaw ku ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, pa ¶unaaj ¶i sin-puo-ji sanwi mańß…ôdaw. ¶aj bur~…ĺad ¶ajr~…ĺim d…ômiad mar~…ĺu ¶…ôk tu mat…ôpa ku r~…ĺum…ôniaj a ńßakuan mar~…ĺu ¶…ôk tu ku kitidaan, saan ku ńßitaj " par~…ĺ…ô ¶ad…ôn kina kawaw" mitur~…ĺin mikir~…ĺin ¶i sin-puo-ji an. r~…ĺu bur~…ĺad ¶ajn…ôm d…ômiad mat…ôpa ku r~…ĺum…ôniaj a ńßakuan sipatajda ńßan i numisaŇčaaj a kakur~…ĺian papiasip tu nikańßi ¶a a nikar~…ĺ…ô ¶…ôpan. tus…ôptun…ôm mińß ¶aan ¶aj bur~…ĺad n…ôm d…ômiad ¶ajwar~…ĺ tuki ¶ajpi ¶ widi, pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj ¶i sin-puo-ji baŇčgu nu ńßikuki **** a f-**am, namaka kar~…ĺinku ńßitaj mubańß…ôr~…ĺ tu r~…ĺabiian nu kakunr~…ĺiŇčan, mur~…ĺawr~…ĺaw ku nipibańß…ôr~…ĺ, ku tatar~…ĺuma tu itida i ¶ajsiw tuki tupi ¶ widi r~…ĺus…ôp b…ôti itida tu tar~…ĺakaw pi ¶n…ôms…ôps…ôp iŇč ¶…ô u nai Ē~ °aj nu t…ôr~…ĺajan a diŇčwa miwiwi tu " two r~…ĺost", ku musakamu tu sakakaaj ar~…ĺaw mańß…ôdaw, ¶ajsiw tuki r~…ĺuwar~…ĺ widi ¶ajwar~…ĺ b…ôti paŇčińßa tu tar~…ĺakaw tasasa Ē~ °sa ¶aaj pis…ôŇčar~…ĺ a tasasa Ē~ ° kina tur~…ĺu ¶i nida miwiwi " pir~…ĺwbuti tu gar~…ĺasaŇč ". katukuńß tu ¶ajsiw tuki r~…ĺuwar~…ĺ widi r~…ĺus…ôp b…ôti, ina ńßikuki tu tar~…ĺakaw itida tu i ¶ajpi ¶s…ôps…ôp iŇč ¶…ô itida i kar~…ĺinku kuŇčuŇč nu timur~…ĺan a bajuan tu r~…ĺu ¶aj a ńßajr~…ĺian, ¶aaj tu ka r~…ĺikat ku diŇčki mur~…ĺ…ô ¶…ôp tu. saan ku sakakaaj nu kuŇčuŇč tu- ¶a- ¶…ôn ¶i ¶in-ji- ¶…ôn, ipabaw nu tapukuan ¶ajr~…ĺu nu nipikir~…ĺiman ¶ajr~…ĺu nu ńßikuki atu i pabaw nu bar~…ĺuŇčan nu ńßitaj kina sabaw ¶a ¶aj a mikir~…ĺim, atu patańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu sakatusa nu kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan nu kitidaan ¶aj ¶ajsiw tad…ômaw tajda i baju mikir~…ĺim, ¶aaj piadińß tu tuki tu pi ¶r~…ĺu takian. ńßaj-sun-su patańß…ôkar~…ĺ mikir~…ĺim nu bar~…ĺuŇča tur~…ĺu a bar~…ĺuŇčaan sabaw tusa a adidiaj nu bar~…ĺuŇčan itini i dadipasan n…ômwar~…ĺ a kadid…ôŇčan nu ńßitaj ¶ajr~…ĺimsip tad…ômawan, mir~…ĺińßida mir~…ĺabu a mikir~…ĺim. mapur~…ĺuŇč ku ńßitaj tu sakaj tapuku mikir~…ĺim, kajŇčuŇč, ńßaj-sun-su a misaańß…ôbar~…ĺaj tu nanum atu mu ¶…ôr~…ĺ…ômaj nu mikir~…ĺim, ar~…ĺańßi ¶an sipakajda i dadipasan a mikir~…ĺim. . nisimsim nu katuudaj **** ¶i ¶uŇč-tuŇč ¶i r~…ĺaj- ¶in-d…ô tu tu s…ôp tu n…ôm mińß ¶aan ¶aj bur~…ĺsad n…ôm d…ômiad r~…ĺabii tudu Ē~ ° tu kuo-ńßaŇč-pu atu mir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj nu pikur~…ĺian pai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ńßan ku nipikir~…ĺim, awmaudip ńß…ônaj ku tad…ôaw anikat…ôpaan nu sakakaaj. saan ku kuo-faŇč-pu pituaj nu d…ômiad sakamusa f-** nu ńßikukian s…ôtup…ôn a ¶aaj pibańß…ôr~…ĺ " t…ôn-an-…ô-ńßaw" nu pikawawan a nipatajda, pai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč a mikinsa, mibańß…ôr~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw as…ôkiŇčan ku nipinanaman tu kakaj nu ńßikukian. siwaaj a d…ômiad, kuo-faŇč-pu ¶i ku Ē~ °-r~…ĺi-sun mijiwkiw tu kar~…ĺinku atu mikir~…ĺimaj nu sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶an nu kakur~…ĺian a misai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč mikir~…ĺim sa, midajńßiw ¶i nida tu ¶i ¶uŇč-tuŇč tajda mińßinum tu r~…ĺumaaj ni sin-puo-ji. ****f-** . kuo-min-t…ôn saan, u sińßu itida i tu s…ôp tu ¶aj mińß ¶aan masur~…ĺit tu a mikijaku tu s…ôpat a mar~…ĺ…ôbutan a waŇč nu sakajsi…ônaw a diku ¶ nunikijakuan. saan kina kuo-min-t…ôn, saipakajni i sakajbańß…ôr~…ĺan nu kasi…ônawan nu diku ¶an, sapibat…ôr~…ĺu nu kikajan atu bar~…ĺuńßaj nu ńßikukian tu ir~…ĺabuaj nu duguan ¶asa katajni, ina kuo-faŇč-pu itini misakamu tu sakakijaku nu misiwbajaj a mana ka utaŇč sa. .
S.FORM: == tu sep tu nem mihcaan Cung-hua-min-kuo kungung F-16V sapilebu a hikuki nu hitay kasedayan mahetik nu kawaw == 2026ŚĻīšł≠ŤŹĮśįĎŚúčÁ©ļŤĽćF-16Vśąįť¨•ś©üŚ§ĪšļčšļčśēÖ tuseptunem mihcaan cay bulad nem demiad nu labii, Cung-hua-min-kuo kungung nu hikuki F-16AM Block 20 itida i Kalinku Bakun nu bayu mikawaw minanam tu labiian nu nipikunlingan mulawlaw ku culil, pacunaay ci Sin-puo-yi sanwi mahedaw. cay bulad caylim demiad malucek tu matepa ku lumeniay a hakuan malucek tu ku kitidaan, saan ku hitay " palecaden kina kawaw" mitulin mikilin ci Sin-puo-yi an. lu bulad caynem demiad matepa ku lumeniay a hakuan sipatayda han i numisangaay a kakulian papiasip tu nikahica a nikalecepan. tuseptunem mihcaan cay bulad nem demiad caywal tuki caypic widi, paculilay ci Sin-puo-yi banggu nu hikuki 6700 a F-16AM, namaka Kalinku hitay mubahel tu labiian nu kakunlingan, mulawlaw ku nipibahel, ku tataluma tu itida i caysiw tuki tupic widi lusep beti itida tu talakaw picnemsepsep ingce u nai'ay nu telayan a dingwa miwiwi tu " two lost", ku musakamu tu sakakaay alaw mahedaw, caysiw tuki luwal widi caywal beti pangiha tu talakaw tasasa'sa caay pisengal a tasasa' kina tulu ci nida miwiwi " pilwbuti tu galasang ". katukuh tu caysiw tuki luwal widi lusep beti, ina hikuki tu talakaw itida tu i caypicsepsep ingce itida i Kalinku kungung nu timulan a bayuan tu lucay a haylian, caay tu ka likat ku dingki mulecep tu. saan ku sakakaay nu kungung tu-ca-cen ci Cin-yi-cen, ipabaw nu tapukuan caylu nu nipikiliman caylu nu hikuki atu i pabaw nu balungan nu hitay kina sabaw cacay a mikilim, atu patahekal tu sakatusa nu kalepacawan nu kitidaan caycaysiw tademaw tayda i bayu mikilim, caay piadih tu tuki tu piclu takian. Hay-sun-su patahekal mikilim nu balunga tulu a balungaan sabaw tusa a adidiay nu balungan itini i dadipasan nemwal a kadidengan nu hitay caylimsip tademawan, milihida milabu a mikilim. mapulung ku hitay tu sakay tapuku mikilim, kayngung, hay-sun-su a misaahebalay tu nanum atu mucelemay nu mikilim, alahican sipakayda i dadipasan a mikilim. . nisimsim nu katuuday ŚźĄÁēĆŚŹćśáČ ci Cung-tung ci Lay-cin-de tu tu sep tu nem mihcaan cay bulsad nem demiad labii tudu' tu Kuo-hang-pu atu milecaday nu pikulian paicelang han ku nipikilim, awmaudip henay ku tadeaw anikatepaan nu sakakaay. saan ku Kuo-fang-pu pituay nu demiad sakamusa F-16 nu hikukian setupen acaay pibahel " ten-an-e-haw" nu pikawawan a nipatayda, paicelang a mikinsa, mibahelay a tademaw asekingan ku nipinanaman tu kakay nu hikukian. siwaay a demiad, Kuo-fang-pu ci Ku'-li-sun miyiwkiw tu Kalinku atu mikilimay nu sakalecan nu kakulian a misaicelang mikilim sa, midayhiw ci nida tu ci Cung-tung tayda mihinum tu lumaay ni Sin-puo-yi. 7śó•šłčšĽ§F-16 . Kuo-min-ten saan, u sihu itida i tu sep tu cay mihcaan masulit tu a mikiyaku tu sepat a malebutan a wang nu sakaysienaw a dikuc nunikiyakuan. saan kina Kuo-min-ten, saipakayni i sakaybahelan nu kasienawan nu dikucan, sapibatelu nu kikayan atu baluhay nu hikukian tu ilabuay nu duguan casa katayni, ina Kuo-fang-pu itini misakamu tu sakakiyaku nu misiwbayay a mana ka utang sa. .

kakunr~…ĺiŇčan, mur~…ĺawr~…ĺaw ku nipibańß…ôr~…ĺ, ku tatar~…ĺuma tu itida i ¶ajsiw tuki tupi ¶ widi r~…ĺus…ôp b…ôti itida tu tar~…ĺakaw pi ¶n…ôms…ôps…ôp iŇč ¶…ô u nai Ē~ °aj nu t…ôr~…ĺajan a diŇčwa miwiwi tu " two r~…ĺost", ku musakamu tu sakakaaj ar~…ĺaw mańß…ôdaw, ¶ajsiw tuki r~…ĺuwar~…ĺ widi ¶ajwar~…ĺ b…ôti paŇčińßa tu tar~…ĺakaw tasasa Ē~ °sa ¶aaj pis…ôŇčar~…ĺ a tasasa Ē~ ° kina tur~…ĺu ¶i nida miwiwi " pir~…ĺwbuti tu gar~…ĺasaŇč ". katukuńß tu ¶ajsiw tuki r~…ĺuwar~…ĺ widi r~…ĺus…ôp b…ôti, ina ńßikuki tu tar~…ĺakaw itida tu i ¶ajpi ¶s…ôps…ôp iŇč ¶…ô itida i kar~…ĺinku kuŇčuŇč nu timur~…ĺan a bajuan tu r~…ĺu ¶aj a ńßajr~…ĺian, ¶aaj tu ka r~…ĺikat ku diŇčki mur~…ĺ…ô ¶…ôp tu. saan ku sakakaaj nu kuŇčuŇč tu- ¶a- ¶…ôn ¶i ¶in-ji- ¶…ôn, ipabaw nu tapukuan ¶ajr~…ĺu nu nipikir~…ĺiman ¶ajr~…ĺu nu ńßikuki atu i pabaw nu bar~…ĺuŇčan nu ńßitaj kina sabaw ¶a ¶aj a mikir~…ĺim, atu patańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu sakatusa nu kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan nu kitidaan ¶aj ¶ajsiw tad…ômaw tajda i baju mikir~…ĺim, ¶aaj piadińß tu tuki tu pi ¶r~…ĺu takian. ńßaj-sun-su patańß…ôkar~…ĺ mikir~…ĺim nu bar~…ĺuŇča tur~…ĺu a bar~…ĺuŇčaan sabaw tusa a adidiaj nu bar~…ĺuŇčan itini i dadipasan n…ômwar~…ĺ a kadid…ôŇčan nu ńßitaj ¶ajr~…ĺimsip tad…ômawan, mir~…ĺińßida mir~…ĺabu a mikir~…ĺim. mapur~…ĺuŇč ku ńßitaj tu sakaj tapuku mikir~…ĺim, kajŇčuŇč, ńßaj-sun-su a misaańß…ôbar~…ĺaj tu nanum atu mu ¶…ôr~…ĺ…ômaj nu mikir~…ĺim, ar~…ĺańßi ¶an sipakajda i dadipasan a mikir~…ĺim. . nisimsim nu katuudaj **** ¶i ¶uŇč-tuŇč ¶i r~…ĺaj- ¶in-d…ô tu tu s…ôp tu n…ôm mińß ¶aan ¶aj bur~…ĺsad n…ôm d…ômiad r~…ĺabii tudu Ē~ ° tu kuo-ńßaŇč-pu atu mir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj nu pikur~…ĺian pai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ńßan ku nipikir~…ĺim, awmaudip ńß…ônaj ku tad…ôaw anikat…ôpaan nu sakakaaj. saan ku kuo-faŇč-pu pituaj nu d…ômiad sakamusa f-** nu ńßikukian s…ôtup…ôn a ¶aaj pibańß…ôr~…ĺ " t…ôn-an-…ô-ńßaw" nu pikawawan a nipatajda, pai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč a mikinsa, mibańß…ôr~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw as…ôkiŇčan ku nipinanaman tu kakaj nu ńßikukian. siwaaj a d…ômiad, kuo-faŇč-pu ¶i ku Ē~ °-r~…ĺi-sun mijiwkiw tu kar~…ĺinku atu mikir~…ĺimaj nu sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶an nu kakur~…ĺian a misai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč mikir~…ĺim sa, midajńßiw ¶i nida tu ¶i ¶uŇč-tuŇč tajda mińßinum tu r~…ĺumaaj ni sin-puo-ji. ****f-** . kuo-min-t…ôn saan, u sińßu itida i tu s…ôp tu ¶aj mińß ¶aan masur~…ĺit tu a mikijaku tu s…ôpat a mar~…ĺ…ôbutan a waŇč nu sakajsi…ônaw a diku ¶ nunikijakuan. saan misakamu tu sakakijaku nu misiwbajaj a mana ka utaŇč sa. .
